name: synth_ip
short_description: Generate a synthesis netlist for an IP
full_help:
synth_ip

Description: 
Generate a synthesis netlist for an IP

Syntax: 
synth_ip  [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose] <objects>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-force]    Force regeneration of the netlist.
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <objects>   All the objects for which a netlist needs to be generated for.

Categories: 
Project, IPFlow

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
